payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active memory matching the Sam-from-Goldman context. mem_old was not returned because it has been superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would be incorrect.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current non-superseded memory matching the query context for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was excluded because it is marked superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt identifies Sam from Goldman as the relevant context, but no durable entity identifier is provided in the fixture input.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was eligible for recall as the current memory associated with Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered because it is superseded and should not be returned as an active current fact.

details: Did not present superseded mem_old as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is incorrect, update or delete mem_new and reconsider whether mem_old should become active again.
If Sam from Goldman resolves to the wrong entity, correct the entity linkage before re-running recall.
